import io
import string
import list

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let val = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not found and val == target
      found = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let min_val = match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, min_val)
    remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(nums, v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let sorted = sort_asc(nums)
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
